product.name: Aramid D3 200
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkane tkaniny aramidowe serii D do odzieży trudnopalnej
product.familyDescriptorEn: Woven D-series aramid fabrics for FR workwear
product.categorySourceGroup: Inherent Flame Retardant Aramid Workwear Fabrics
product.titleDescriptor: Aramid Fabric, 75% meta Aramid 23% para Aramid 2% Carbon , 200 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 200 g/m², 75% m-Aramid 23% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, 2/1S Twill Fabric Aramid twill fabric
descriptions: Flame resistant (Flame retardant) fabric with EN ISO 11612 certification.
Aramid Fabric, 75% meta Aramid 23% para Aramid 2% Carbon , 200 gr/m'2
200 g/m², 75% m-Aramid 23% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, 2/1S Twill Fabric Aramid twill fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 75% m-Aramid (m-AR) 23% p-Aramid (p-AR) 2% Carbon(CF) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp>1500N; Weft>1000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>70N ; Weft>60N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Yes | EN ISO 11612

matches.rationale: Product data explicitly states intended application as firefighter costumes/turnout gear and is certified to EN 469, the firefighting standard, directly supporting the firefighting application.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Fabric has antistatic (EN 1149-5) and arc protection (EN 61482) properties, which are relevant to electrical hazard protection, but no explicit statement ties it to the energy sector or electrical utility work.
Inherent FR and heat protection could be relevant to metalworking, but no explicit mention of welding, foundry or molten metal splash use.
Aramid FR fabrics are sometimes used in military protective gear, but no explicit military, police or tactical use is stated in the product data.
